hypothesis: Deliberately introducing a dopant sublattice that forms a connected stabilizing network within AI-designed Si–X alloys will keep Li+-diffusion channel radii (Rt) almost unchanged (variation < ±0.2 Å) throughout lithiation and delithiation, thereby enabling simultaneous high gravimetric capacity (>1500 mAh g−1) and substantially improved cycle life relative to undoped Si–X alloys.
